title: Golden Crispy Ukrainian Tofu Dumplings
description: A crispy and savory ovo-vegetarian Ukrainian dish featuring marinated tofu and a side of sweet ice cream, perfect for meal prep. This dish is a unique blend of flavors and textures.

ingredients.name: firm tofu
ingredients.notes: drained and cut into small cubes

instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together flour, cornstarch, and a pinch of salt.
Add the beaten egg to the bowl and mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Divide the dough into small pieces and roll each piece into a ball.
Flatten each ball into a disk shape and place a cube of tofu in the center of each disk.
Fold the dough over the tofu to form a half-moon shape and press the edges together to seal.
Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat and fry the dumplings until they are golden brown.
Serve the dumplings hot with a side of sweet ice cream and marinade sauce for dipping.
